Task: Write a detailed essay or article about a time you either helped someone else or received help when you needed it most.
In your writing, please include:
The Situation: Describe what was happening. What was the problem or the challenge that required someone to step in?
The Action: What exactly did you (or the other person) do to help? Describe the interaction clearly.
The Reaction: How did it feel at that exact moment? Was there a sense of relief, surprise, or pride?
The Lesson: Reflect on what that experience taught you about kindness or teamwork. How did it change your relationship with that person or your view of others?

I'm going to write about the relationship of my cousin that was about 10 years ago. Which was near to broke but fortunately the relation wasn't broke.
   
   10 years ago when my cousin engaged, after some day she decided to leave her husband. She called me and said that you must talk with elders to come and refuse my engagement, she told me that I don't want to marry with that guy, I don't love him and he is not good for me. Then I talk with her and gave her some advice after that told her all the kindness and the goodness of her husband and his family. I told her that you should think about all advice that I gave you. Tomorrow tell me your decision then I will do some think. Second day she called me that sorry for all I done , I'm to marriage with him. She also told me that the elder and my parents decision are not bad for me. After a week she met her fiancé, the problem was solved.

 Fortunately after one week all situation became normal, They met each other and their family. After 6 months they married. Now they have a happy life with their tow cute children. She is always thanks me because of that and she loves her husband. Now I'm proud on my self that I succeed. 

  That situation taught me that by kindness and some good advice can change the life of people. We should always be patient, be kind and help others as well.
